title: AFI Analysis Plugin Manifest v1 (FACTORY-CONTRACT — declarative plugin contract)
description: The canonical MANIFEST of one analysis plugin (afi.analysis-plugin.v1): the declarative contract a pipeline node binds by pluginId+pluginVersion. It declares the plugin's category, input/output schema references, determinism, capabilities (provider/secret requirements), execution defaults, permitted failure policies, its inline paramsSchema (the JSON Schema that validates a node's config), multi-instance admissibility, category-level ordering constraints, and whether its output may feed the scorer. It deliberately contains NO filesystem paths and NO code references: binding a manifest to code happens in the consuming runtime's BUILD-TIME plugin registry keyed by pluginId+pluginVersion.
$comment: BOUNDARY (FACTORY-CONTRACT): schema/contract only — NO plugin loading, NO dynamic import, NO registry implementation. inputSchemaRef/outputSchemaRef are schema IDENTIFIERS (afi.* schema ids or https://afi-protocol.org/schemas/... URLs), structurally rejecting filesystem paths. capabilities name REQUIREMENT CLASSES (e.g. provider:coinalyze, secret:COINALYZE_API_KEY) — never secret values.
x-afiDoctrineRefs: afi-governance/decisions/factory-configurable-pipelines-v1 — authorizes the canonical V1 contract family
reports/afi-configurable-dag-live-runtime-reconciliation.md §2/§6 — the five code-canonical analysis categories + capability/determinism/fail-semantics facts this manifest makes declarative
afi-governance/decisions/math-authority-v0.1.md — strategy/pipeline composition is implementation-layer; this manifest declares composition surface, never scoring law

x-afiConstraints.buildTimeBinding: Binding to code happens in the consuming runtime's build-time registry by pluginId+pluginVersion. No filesystem path, module specifier, or entrypoint is representable in this manifest (structurally: inputSchemaRef/outputSchemaRef admit only afi.* schema ids or afi-protocol.org schema URLs; additionalProperties:false rejects entrypoint-like fields).
x-afiConstraints.paramsSchemaAuthority: paramsSchema is the SINGLE authority for validating a pipeline node's config bound to this plugin. The factory/runtime MUST validate node.config against it (AJV draft-07, strict) before accepting a composition; an invalid config fails closed.
x-afiConstraints.capabilitiesAreRequirements: capabilities declare requirement classes the operator environment must satisfy (provider:<id>, secret:<ENV_NAME>, feed:<id>, ...). They NEVER carry secret material and never grant anything by themselves.
x-afiConstraints.orderingScope: orderingConstraints are CATEGORY-level hints (mustRunBefore/mustRunAfter name categories, not node ids) enforced by factory composition validation, not by this schema.
x-afiConstraints.scorerFeed: mayFeedScorer declares whether this plugin's output is admissible as scorer input. Composition tooling MUST reject a manifest wiring a mayFeedScorer:false plugin's output into the scorer's join surface.
x-afiConstraints.hashMaterial: The plugin-set hash (pluginSetHash in afi.composition-ref.v1, domain tag afi.factory.plugin-set) is computed over the canonically serialized, canonically ordered set of bound plugin manifests per schemas/hashing/canonical-json-hashing.v1.md, excluding description and metadata.

schema.description: Schema-id version of the plugin manifest.

pluginId.description: Stable plugin identifier (lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens). Registry key together with pluginVersion.

pluginVersion.description: Semver (NO v prefix) of this manifest's CONTRACT surface. Bumped whenever the declared contract changes.

implementationVersion.description: Version identity of the CODE realizing this contract (e.g. a package version or build identifier). Distinct axis from pluginVersion: an implementation fix that preserves the contract bumps only this.

category.description: Governed plugin category: the five analysis categories plus merge and scorer. A pipeline node may bind only a plugin of its own category.

description.description: OPTIONAL human-readable description; excluded from canonical hash material.

inputSchemaRef.description: Identifier of the schema the plugin's input payload conforms to (afi.* schema id or afi-protocol.org schema URL). NEVER a filesystem path.

outputSchemaRef.description: Identifier of the schema the plugin's output payload conforms to. NEVER a filesystem path.

deterministic.description: TRUE iff the plugin is a pure function of its validated input + config (no external I/O, no clock, no randomness). External-provider plugins MUST declare false.

items.description: Requirement class the operator environment must satisfy, e.g. 'provider:coinalyze', 'secret:COINALYZE_API_KEY', 'feed:ohlcv'.

capabilities.description: OPTIONAL declared requirement classes. Never secret values (x-afiConstraints.capabilitiesAreRequirements).

defaultTimeoutMs.description: OPTIONAL default per-invocation timeout applied when the pipeline node declares none.

defaultRetryPolicy.description: OPTIONAL default retry policy applied when the pipeline node declares none.

permittedFailurePolicies.description: OPTIONAL whitelist of failure policies a node binding this plugin may declare. Absent means only 'abort'. Composition tooling rejects a node declaring a policy outside this set.

paramsSchema.description: REQUIRED inline JSON Schema (draft-07) fragment that validates a binding node's config. Use {} (permit-all) only for genuinely configuration-free plugins; the factory validates every node.config against this before accepting a composition.

multiInstance.description: Whether one pipeline may bind this plugin on MULTIPLE nodes (e.g. two news nodes with different windows). Defaults false: composition tooling rejects repeated binding unless declared true.

orderingConstraints.description: OPTIONAL category-level ordering hints enforced by factory composition validation (x-afiConstraints.orderingScope).

mayFeedScorer.description: REQUIRED declaration of whether this plugin's output is admissible as scorer input (x-afiConstraints.scorerFeed). Category 'scorer' plugins declare false (a scorer never feeds another scorer — it is the sink).

metadata.description: OPTIONAL free-form annotations; non-authoritative; excluded from canonical hash material.
